'Rendezvous with Internship Cell', this webinar was organized to acquaint the students of SIESCE with the working of the Internship Cell and the various rules and procedures one must follow while applying for an internship. Three members of the Internship Cell were the presenters for this webinar. Mrs. Fleur Fernandes, the Chairperson of the Internship Cell, resolved all the doubts and queries raised by the attendees. A total of 39 participants, including 3 organizers and 1 faculty attended this webinar. This webinar was both, informative and interactive.

The Entrepreneurship Cell of SIES College of Commerce and Economics organized a webinar on 'Digital Marketing 101' on 21st October 2021 from 4:00pm to 5:30 pm. The speaker for the event was Mr. Deep Mehta, the Co-Founder of DigiChefs. He explained digital marketing, startup barriers, web strategies, SEO, and Facebook/Instagram targeting options. 133 students, 3 faculties and 1 guest speaker attended.

Student Development Program on 'Business Etiquettes, Grooming and Presenting yourself in the Corporate' in association with IBS. Speaker: Prof. Priyanka Dhingra.

Investor Awareness Program with Board of Industry-Academia Partnerships on behalf of Central Depository Services Ltd. Guest speakers: Mr. Sanjay Nunes, Dr. Riya Nathani, Mr. Yogesh Kundnani. 90 students attended.
Online session on Womens in leadership defense on Google Meet. Discussion on Womens leadership in Indian Defense services.
